comment: I recently had the pleasure of working with Mean Green on a backyard project that included a yard clean up and new shrub/tree install. I was pleased how it turned out and so are all of my guest. We had to veer off the original plan a little bit (my fault) but MG had the equipment and personnel skillset to make it seamless. I will be using them in the future.
draft_response: We really appreciate the kind words, Luke. Knowing that the lawn care went well for you in Fort Worth is exactly the kind of feedback that keeps our crew motivated. Thank you for trusting Black Hill Landscaping with your property.
